aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup, but lacks depth in content and optimization for AI search. The repetitive and thin content is a significant drawback.
quick_wins: Expand and diversify website content to include detailed service descriptions, location-specific pages, and relevant keywords.
Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve local search visibility.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords to improve search engine understanding of the site's content.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic contact information but lacks a consistent and structured approach to Google Business Profile (GBP) optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not leveraged GBP effectively. The absence of GBP integration and customer reviews is a critical issue.
critical_issues: No GBP listing found or linked from the website.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has some local citations but lacks consistency and comprehensiveness across directories.
action_items: Audit and update NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information across all online directories to ensure consistency.
Increase the number of high-quality citations on reputable platforms such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local business associations.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on citation sites to improve local search ranking.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information.
No Product or Service schema for specific HVAC services offered.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive and unique content tailored to AI search queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: AI search engines due to repetitive and thin content.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQ sections with questions and answers related to HVAC services and local heating/cooling needs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Create blog posts or articles on topics like 'Energy-efficient HVAC solutions for Baltimore winters' to establish authority and improve AI visibility.

page_title: Expert Air Conditioning Repair & HVAC Services
